---
title: 'Anniversary Cows'
date: '2012-06-11T03:24:00.0050000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7180787329360833525'
blogger_filename: '/2012/06/anniversary-cows.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Cows'
---

<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" /></div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
These are Cows Testing</div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<div style="text-align: center;">
<a href="http://tc-ccrafts.blogspot.com/2012/06/cows.html">Back to Cows</a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
</div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/anniversary-cows-e6150d58f015.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/anniversary-cows-e6150d58f015.jpg" /></a></div>
<br class="Apple-interchange-newline" />
